label: Floor 02 Gateway
info: Phase 2 Floor Gateway. Bridges CoAP Observe streams (UDP) and MQTT traffic (TCP) between 20 rooms on this floor and the HiveMQ backbone, plus 60s edge thinning, offline autonomy, and MQTT DUP-flag deduplication.
